name: recoil_app_mfc_ole_module_destructor
description: RecoilApp::MfcOleModuleDestructor tears down the embedded chunked state queue before chaining to the MFC app destructor.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 233 unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 256 bytes and the VC object body is 224 bytes with 11 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
Reviewed drift is in compiler destructor cleanup shape around the embedded queue teardown and CWinApp destructor chain, not in the recovered state-queue contract.
The native smoke constructs the MFC/OLE module state, installs an allocated queue chunk, calls the destructor helper, and checks that the queue item count and read/write blocks are cleared.
